Findings.Title: USB Threat: SQLite.Interop.dll
Findings.Description: Extension mismatch: '.dll' extension but file header indicates different type
Findings.Remediation: 1. Do not open this file. Extension mismatches can indicate disguised malicious payloads. 2. Verify with the file owner what the actual file type should be. 3. If source is unverified, quarantine the drive and report to your security team.
